strings.hero_caption: Manage languages, cached packs, and runtime settings, then pull updates from GitHub / Gitee when needed.
strings.save_status_success: Runtime settings saved and pages will react automatically.
strings.theme_palette_help: Choose a unified theme pack that defines both color and surface style for the OpenClaw console.
strings.theme_ui_style_help: Choose the control shapes, spacing, and surface treatment.
strings.theme_style_override_help: Unify cards, buttons, and form controls.
strings.theme_style_repair_help: Patch borders, focus rings, and spacing details.
strings.theme_select_fix_help: Restyle browser-default selects to match the active theme.
strings.theme_code_block_fix_help: Refine the code block shell, header bar, and copy-button hover feedback.
strings.theme_preset_openclaw-classic_descriptio: The familiar OpenClaw look, keeping native colors while repairing card, spacing, and control polish.
strings.theme_preset_graphite-signal_description: A pure dark console palette with graphite layers, mint signal accents, and clean OLED-friendly contrast.
strings.theme_preset_cinder-amber_description: A pure dark palette built from cinder neutrals and amber highlights for a warmer command-room feel.
strings.theme_preset_paper-blueprint_description: A clean light palette with paper-white surfaces, blueprint blues, and restrained contrast for daytime control work.
strings.ui_style_preset_openclaw-default_descrip: Keeps the native OpenClaw shape language while normalizing spacing, controls, and repaired surfaces.
strings.ui_style_preset_material_description: Clear outlines, tonal surfaces, layered elevation, and stronger state feedback inspired by Material components.
strings.ui_style_preset_flat_description: Sharper geometry, solid fills, reduced depth, and cleaner block-to-block contrast.
strings.theme_preset_material-workbench_descript: A full Material-inspired workbench with tonal surfaces, clear outlines, and stronger state feedback across the page.
strings.theme_preset_soft-neomorph_description: A full soft-neumorphic redesign with improved light-theme contrast, tactile surfaces, and gentle raised controls.
strings.theme_status_builtin: Using the bundled console theme pack.
strings.theme_status_cached: A remote console theme pack is cached from {source}.
strings.theme_status_selected: Theme settings changed. Save theme settings to apply them.
strings.theme_status_success: Theme settings saved. The selected console theme is now active.
strings.theme_status_no_sources: No remote console theme source is configured.
strings.theme_status_downloading: Fetching the remote console theme pack...
strings.theme_status_download_success: Fetched the console theme pack from {source}: {version}
strings.theme_font_system_note: Keep the browser and OS default sans-serif stack.
strings.theme_font_modern_note: Prefer a clean modern sans-serif rendering.
strings.theme_font_serif_note: A softer serif presentation for long-form settings.
strings.panel_locale_system_note: Match the system language whenever the popup opens
strings.panel_locale_status_hint: Button labels, section titles, and status copy update immediately after switching.
strings.panel_locale_status_selected: A new popup language is selected. Click "Apply panel language" to switch.
strings.content_locale_status_cached: {locale} is cached and ready to use.
strings.content_locale_status_builtin: The built-in language pack is active. Download a remote update if needed.
strings.content_locale_status_selected: A new content language is selected. Click "Apply content language" to activate it.
strings.content_locale_status_no_sources: No remote language-pack source is configured.
strings.repo_note: Author: cloud11. A repo star is always appreciated, thanks meow.
strings.meta_status_checking: Showing bundled metadata and checking the remote source...
strings.meta_status_no_sources: No remote metadata source is configured. Showing bundled data only.
strings.meta_status_loading: Fetching the latest metadata from GitHub / Gitee...
strings.ui_style_preset_frosted-glass_descriptio: Translucent layers, softer highlights, and blurred surfaces for a restrained glass treatment.
strings.ui_style_preset_soft-neumorphism_descrip: Diffuse highlights, pill-like depth, and inset shadows for a softer tactile control style.
strings.ui_style_preset_glass-lens_description: Glossy lens-like gradients, stronger internal highlights, and brightened glass edges inspired by layered mobile glass UI.
